title: VOUCHER ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES VOUCHER ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, heating fuel, and water bills. Also assists with rent, gas money, and prescriptions. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Individuals requesting assistance must be full-time residents. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 563-3710 4 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 563-3710 Main phone Main phone (541) 563-3710 ext 4 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Cities of Five Rivers, Seal Rock, Tidewater, Waldport, and Yachats (Lincoln County only) SITE HOURS: Varies by service TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In industrial area south of Waldport schools Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Money Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - WALDPORT FOOD SHARE MATERIAL GOODS - ADVENTIST CLOTHING SHARE MATERIAL GOODS - APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES
